risk.desc: Deployment shock may exceed design limits if spring preload is not properly set.
risk.mit: Conduct preload tests and adjust spring tension as necessary.

risk.desc: Thermal cycling may cause unexpected deformation if not properly accounted for in material selection.
risk.mit: Use thermal analysis to validate material choice and design.

risk.desc: Radiation hardening may not be sufficient if not properly integrated into the design.
risk.mit: Ensure all components are radiation-hardened and validate through testing.

risk.mit: Conduct burn-wire release tests and validate mechanism reliability.

risk.desc: Solar panel efficiency may be reduced if not properly aligned during deployment.
risk.mit: Include alignment features and conduct alignment tests.

thermal_path: Thermal cycling from -40°C to +80°C managed by CFRP and Al 7075 material choice, with thermal zones at solar_panel_face and deploy_hinge
motion_path: Deployment motion initiated by burn_wire_note, controlled by spring-loaded hinge and damper mechanism
